title: VanillaX Shaders
description: A shaderpack that brings a clean and modern visual upgrade to Minecraft while preserving the game’s classic atmosphere and vanilla charm.
body:
### ABOUT

A lightweight yet visually immersive shaderpack designed to enhance Minecraft with bright natural lighting, clear reflective water, soft atmospheric shadows, and smooth vanilla-styled visuals. It keeps the original Minecraft feel while adding a fresh modern look, making survival worlds feel more vibrant, calm, and cinematic without heavily impacting performance.


### Features
- Reflective and crystal-clear water

- Toggleable water wave effects
 
- Adjustable foliage waving intensity

[![YT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f48639fd7b91b3a2c29f76ac474ba419a01a109.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@GlacierServicesMC)



### How to report BUGS!!

Our GlacierDevelopment Discord server is Live you can report bugs and Chat with other GlacierShaders users, report bugs, get help with issues, and join exciting giveaways — all in one place!
